◎简　　介  

　　From mining and exploration, to an exclusive look deep inside a top-security Swiss bank-vault, this is the epic, untold story of gold’s 6000 year history. With help from leading industry insiders, Grant Williams uncovers how gold became central to the modern global finance system.Grant Williams presents the definitive analysis of gold, in a brand new two-part Real Vision docum...
